attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
XAL.AE_HEADER_ID,
XAL.AE_LINE_NUM,
XAL.APPLICATION_ID,
XAL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
XAL.GL_TRANSFER_MODE_CODE,
XAL.GL_SL_LINK_ID,
XAL.ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE,
XAL.PARTY_ID,
XAL.PARTY_SITE_ID,
 XAL.PARTY_TYPE_CODE,
XAL.ENTERED_DR,
XAL.ENTERED_CR,
XAL.ACCOUNTED_DR,
XAL.ACCOUNTED_CR,
XAL.DESCRIPTION,
XAL.STATISTICAL_AMOUNT,
XAL.CURRENCY_CODE,
XAL.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE,
XAL.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,
XAL.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE,
XAL.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,
XAL.JGZZ_RECON_REF,
XAL.CONTROL_BALANCE_FLAG,
XAL.ANALYTICAL_BALANCE_FLAG,
XAL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
XAL.ATTRIBUTE1,
XAL.ATTRIBUTE2,
XAL.ATTRIBUTE3,
XAL.ATTRIBUTE4,
XAL.ATTRIBUTE5,
XAL.ATTRIBUTE6,
XAL.ATTRIBUTE7,
XAL.ATTRIBUTE8,
TRIM(XAL.ATTRIBUTE9),
XAL.ATTRIBUTE10,
XAL.ATTRIBUTE11,
XAL.ATTRIBUTE12,
XAL.ATTRIBUTE13,
XAL.ATTRIBUTE14,
XAL.ATTRIBUTE15,
XAL.GL_SL_LINK_TABLE,
XAL.DISPLAYED_LINE_NUMBER,
XAL.CREATION_DATE,
XAL.CREATED_BY,
XAL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
XAL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
XAL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
XAL.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
XAL.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
XAL.PROGRAM_ID,
XAL.REQUEST_ID,
XAL.UPG_BATCH_ID,
XAL.UPG_TAX_REFERENCE_ID1,
XAL.UPG_TAX_REFERENCE_ID2,
XAL.UPG_TAX_REFERENCE_ID3,
XAL.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,
XAL.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,
XAL.GAIN_OR_LOSS_FLAG,
XAL.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,
XAL.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,
XAL.SUBSTITUTED_CCID,
XAL.BUSINESS_CLASS_CODE,
XAL.MPA_ACCRUAL_ENTRY_FLAG,
XAL.ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID,
XAL.FUNDS_STATUS_CODE,
XAL.MERGE_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
XAL.MERGE_PARTY_ID,
XAL.MERGE_PARTY_SITE_ID,
XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE,
XAL.LEDGER_ID,
XAL.SOURCE_TABLE,
XAL.SOURCE_ID,
XAL.ACCOUNT_OVERLAY_SOURCE_ID,
XAL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
'CG'AS GLOBAL_NAME ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS CREATE_DATETIME ,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE
FROM	
(
 SELECT	XAL.* 
FROM	$$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XLA_AE_LINES     XAL
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR
 ON XAL.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
 WHERE   UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME) ='REVENUE ATTRIBUTION'
 AND EFAR.LANG = 'US' 
 AND XAL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >='$$LastExtractDate' 
 QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY XAL.AE_HEADER_ID ,XAL.AE_LINE_NUM ,XAL.APPLICATION_ID  
ORDER	BY XAL.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
 )XAL
WHERE	XAL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
